overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated highways, and diverse pedestrians in a cyberpunk setting with overcast weather and wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character waits for vehicles then crosses the intersection with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking with a crowd across a busy intersection, following an NCPD officer

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in tactical vest leading the group across the street
futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street ahead
tall building with distinctive circular neon pink and blue signage
red pedestrian signal box with illuminated yellow walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a busy futuristic intersection, crossing the street with a dense crowd including an NCPD officer. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while a massive elevated highway overpass looms ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the overcast sky and neon signs of the surrounding commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: moves from open intersection into the covered area beneath the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow crop top and shorts walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: water channel running parallel to the street visible through the railing
large illuminated advertisements on the facades of commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking under the massive concrete overpass, the scene becomes more sheltered with mixed lighting. The canal waterway becomes visible to the left through the railing, while digital billboards illuminate the commercial buildings on the right. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the tiled sidewalk.

events.description: camera pans left to view the canal and distinctive tiered building architecture
camera pans back to forward-facing direction to continue walking

agents.ego_description: pausing to look left at the canal and unique industrial architecture, then resuming forward movement

entered.detail: distinctive multi-level building with X-shaped structural supports and mechanical details
elevated red train track running above the canal waterway

segments.scene_description: The character turns to observe the canal waterfront, revealing a striking tiered industrial building with X-shaped supports across the water. The red monorail track runs parallel above the canal. After viewing the architecture, the camera returns to the forward path to continue the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching commercial district intersection

events.description: returns to forward walking path and continues along the sidewalk
approaching another pedestrian crosswalk with traffic signals visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians while approaching the next intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright green pants standing near the railing looking at device

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers and high-rise buildings visible down the street corridor
multi-story buildings with ground floor shops and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing the walk along the tiled sidewalk, the character moves past pedestrians and approaches the next intersection. The elevated highway structure now runs parallel on the left, while commercial buildings with neon signage line the right. Distant skyscrapers rise ahead against the overcast sky as the journey progresses through the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling futuristic downtown that transitions from a wide, open intersection into a sheltered urban corridor. It begins with the character crossing a wet, neon-reflective street amidst a dense crowd and passing vehicles, moving steadily toward a massive concrete highway overpass. As the camera passes beneath the looming structure, the environment shifts to a more enclosed space where digital billboards illuminate the sidewalk and a canal waterway appears to the left. The perspective then pivots toward the waterfront to reveal a tiered industrial building with X-shaped supports and a red monorail track above, before turning back to the forward path. Finally, the scene opens up again as the character continues along the tiled walkway, flanked by the parallel highway and glowing commercial buildings, heading toward distant skyscrapers under an overcast sky.
